occupation: Co-Founder and Executive Director at Adzymic
summary:
Marketer turned Entrepreneur. Dynamic Marketing professional/leader, with extensive experience at SAP, OgilvyOne, Hewlett Packard, Sun Microsystems and SAP, both in Asia Pacific Regional role as well as in China.

Worked with brands such as Philips, Adidas, Kohler, Pingan, China Telecom, in area of interactive strategy, online marketing campaign planning, web infrastructure design and CRM programs design.

Unique blend of creative mindset, marketing acumen and technical-know-how.

Specialties: Integrated Marketing Strategy and Planning, Database Marketing, Digital Marketing (Paid, Owned and Earned Media), Web Information Architecture, Analytics, Telemarketing, B2B Demand Generation and CRM Program Management

experiences.title: Co-Founder and Executive Director
experiences.description:
Adzymic - Next Generation Dynamic Creative Management Platform that transforms Display Advertising into high performing Native Advertising and Performance Marketing Engine.

Visit www.adzymic.co for more information. Or simply drop me a note at travis(a)adzymic.co to find out more! Happy to share with you what we are doing in this space.

experiences.title: Director, Integrated Media
experiences.description:
Lead global and regional digital media practices: Programmatic media buying, audience targeting, paid social, paid search, native advertising
Integrate paid, owned and earned media to drive optimal spend and business result. Establish cross media performance framework
Media Agency management

experiences.title: Manager, Demand Center Marketing, China
experiences.description:
-Lead and manage Demand Center Marketing team in demand generation activities for sales pipeline building.
-Work with Marketing and Sales stakeholders in planning and execution of Multi-touch Demand Generation campaigns through Online Media (Paid, Earned, Owned), Leads Nurturing, Inbound Marketing, Telemarketing Support and Inside Sales Engagement.

experiences.title: Marketing Program Manager
experiences.description:
-Manage marketing programs for Supplies -one of the key product line for Hewlett Packard
-Develop integrated marketing program plans with agencies and key stake holders to ensure that the appropriate target audience is identified and reached, the most effective customer-centic messages are communicated and that the marketing return on investment is maximized
-Provide guidance and collaborates with Country Marketing Program managers/region product managers through the development and execution of programs to meet marketing objectives.

experiences.title: Regional Online Marketing Manager
experiences.description:
-Work in partnership with Lifecycle Marketing Corporate Team members to deploy integrated marketing initiatives such as Contact to Revenue programs, teleweb, automated lifecycle campaigns across APAC.
-Develop and drive data-driven demand generation activities (White Papers Downloads, Webinars, Software Downloads) through online channels such as Email, Search, Web, and ensure all leads are captured, routed, tagged and reported.
-Go to person for all data analytics related work: Campaign Dashboard setup, Offline Data Sync Process and Optimisation, Data health-check, Data-gap identification and working with global data analytics team in performing data augmentation.
-Initiate and develop campaign optimization tactics such as A/B testing, Forms Optimisation, Predictive Data Modelling
-Ensure all campaigns are launch in a timely, effective and efficient manner, including measurement and analysis of marketing programs, and management of segmentation, contact strategy.

experiences.title: Senior Consultant, Interactive Strategy
experiences.description:
-Lead a team of consultants in Online Marketing, CRM and Data Analytics Consultancy, growing the consulting business into a multi-millions dollar revenue stream
-Partner with Ogilvy & Mather Advertising to plan and deliver Integrated Marketing programs.
-End-to-end consultancy of Interactive Marketing. These including leads generation, web strategy development, mobile marketing, ecommerce, online campaign planning, SEO/SEM, database marketing, CRM, information architecture design.
-Provide data analysis and consultancy of CRM loyalty program database and develop actionable insights and data-driven CRM plans.

Clients include: SAP, PingAn insurance, Philips, Adidas, Kodak, Kohler, Bank of Communication

experiences.title: Regional eMarketing/CRM Program Manager
experiences.description:
-Work with Country eMarketing Managers, partners and agencies in end to end planning and execution of Country Online Marketing Programs through Web, Email or SMS.
-Define regional operational best practices in running Customer Acquisition, Redemption Program, Customer Analytics, Online Campaigns Management that are consistent with HP CRM strategies
-Manage Customer Knowledge through Analytics, Targeting and Segmentation, and Datamining (Both Passive and Active) to identify potential buyers and leads drive improvement in Campaigns ROI.
-Regional Business lead in various Global/Regional CRM Infrastructure/Capabilities Implementation.
-Manage HP AP Consumer Datamart, inclusive of managing list extraction, report definition, defining AP CKM Data Framework and streamline acquisition process from various databases and touchpoints.

experiences.title: Co-Founder
experiences.description: Develop Tradershub - Singapore first virtual Stock Trading Platform

education.description: Concepts of statistical inference and data mining to problems in business and industry. Statistical methods that are commonly used for quality improvement in industry, ranging from hypothesis testing to regression analysis and other multivariate methods. Train and validate models that are applied to business problems such as customer acquisition and retention.

education.field_of_study: Professional Diploma in Asia Pacific Marketi

recommendations:
Silvia Santos

I was fortunate enough to meet Travis when I joined the team. His extensive knowledge together with his unique blend of technical know-how, entrepreneur mindset and creativeness make him an excellent professional. He's also an all-around great guy. I look forward to working with Travis again.

Steven Fang Yucheng

Its rare that you come across standout talent like Travis. 'Creativity'; 'Extensive knowledge of digital marketing'; 'Exceptional leader' are the terms I would use to describe Travis, as a client, Travis always led his team giving us clear, accurate project brief, his ability to plan and execute his digital marketing strategy for SAP is exceptional and reliable! Travis earned my respect through out the years we worked together!!
